TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Btug o kingal qngqaya djiyun qmpah dxgal Truku sbiyaw, btug nii o snalu dha rqling djima, dhngulun dha ka isilmdka yayu mkan balay. Kmtuy masu ka Truku sbiyaw o asi ka dmuuy btug, kika mrana ngalun dha ka masu ngalun dha hkawas duri, ini tduwa dmuuy snalu xiluy ka qngqay kmtuy masu, yasa aji mha malu nangal masu ka hkawas da msa ka rudan.
S.PHON: btug o kiŋal qŋqaja dɟijun qmpaħ dxgal tɾuku sbijaw, btug nii o snalu dħa ɾqliŋ dɟima, dħŋulun dħa ka isilmdka jaju mkan balaj. kmtuj masu ka tɾuku sbijaw o asi ka dmuuj btug, kika mɾana ŋalun dħa ka masu ŋalun dħa ħkawas duɾi, ini tduwa dmuuj snalu xiluj ka qŋqaj kmtuj masu, jasa aɟi mħa malu naŋal masu ka ħkawas da msa ka ɾudan.
S.FORM: Btug o kingal qngqaya djiyun qmpah dxgal Truku sbiyaw, btug nii o snalu dha rqling djima, dhngulun dha ka isilmdka yayu mkan balay. Kmtuy masu ka Truku sbiyaw o asi ka dmuuy btug, kika mrana ngalun dha ka masu ngalun dha hkawas duri, ini tduwa dmuuy snalu xiluy ka qngqay kmtuy masu, yasa aji mha malu nangal masu ka hkawas da msa ka rudan.
S.PHON: btug o kiŋal qŋqaja dɟijun qmpaħ dxgal tɾuku sbijaw, btug nii o snalu dħa ɾqliŋ dɟima, dħŋulun dħa ka isilmdka jaju mkan balaj. kmtuj masu ka tɾuku sbijaw o asi ka dmuuj btug, kika mɾana ŋalun dħa ka masu ŋalun dħa ħkawas duɾi, ini tduwa dmuuj snalu xiluj ka qŋqaj kmtuj masu, jasa aɟi mħa malu naŋal masu ka ħkawas da msa ka ɾudan.
